title: Account of Wine
translation_text: To Sarapion son of Horos. To Horos son of Pathotes 1, likewise 4. 28th (vac.). To Geron son of Pamoun, 50 maria. To Horos son of Akysis, 15. To Horos the donkey-driver, 8. To Sarapion son of Horos for the son of Herak( ) through the son of Ammonios son of Philiskos, 4. Epeiph 13. Share of Psenamounis son of Pathotes 16. I got from Aquila . . . [- -] 1, Pauni 20

title: Account of wine
summary: Account of wine, each name with an entry of 8 maria
translation_text: (Lines 2-4) Psais and Am---, 8 maria; Psenamounis . . . 8 maria; Psennesis . . . 8 maria.

title: Account of oil
summary: Account of oil in keramia and choes; mentions a prostheke and a deacon.
translation_text: (Convex) Petosiris son of Psentheth, 16 keramia. Samos son of Patchot( ), 18 keramia and 1 keramion for extra; and 1 keramion for extra. Bekis son of Psaios, 32 choes of oil and 32 for extra. Besis son of Horos 15 choes and 2 choes. Psennesis also called Lykarion, 5 choes and 1 chous for extra. Petosiris son of Psenthotes, 20 choes and 2 choes for extra. (Concave) Bekis the deacon, 15 choes and 2 choes for extra.

title: Account of grain
translation_text: Through Pamounis, 1 modius; through the steward and That and others, 2 modii; through Psais son of Petechon, 1 modius
